description: A father Netanʾel b. Yefet ha-Levi stands security for the income from 14/24 shares in a house which he had given to his daughter at her marriage. Handwriting of the cantor Aharon ha-Mumḥe b. Efrayim. At the top the name Ṣedaqa peqid ha-soḥarim and his father's name also appear. (Information in part from Goitein's index card.) On verso there are separate accounts in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals.
description_he: אב נתנאל בן יפת הלוי ערב על הכנסה מ-14/24 חלקים בבית שנתן לבתו בנישואיה; בכתב יד החזן אהרון המומחה בן אפרים
